designBrief.silhouette: work vehicle with crane/manipulator arm and utility body
designBrief.palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips
designBrief.materialFamily: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a red faction construction & repair vehicle in an alien RTS. Material: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor. Palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: brutalist, asymmetric reinforcement, battle wear, non-human panel language. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: weapons, aggressive armor spikes. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, flat orthographic texture-sheet showcasing the hull of a heavy-duty sci-fi construction and repair vehicle, rendered without perspective, baked lighting, or text. The dominant material is rugged gunmetal rolled battle steel, interspersed with areas of heavily scorched plating and reinforced riveted armor. Intricate alien industrial surface details abound, including subtly pulsating crimson/orange emissive accent strips tracing non-standard panel lines, small embedded crystalline power conduits glowing softly, and complex arrays of multi-directional hexagonal vents etched with faint, alien-script-like scorch patterns. The rivets are uniquely shaped, resembling segmented metallic insects, anchoring plates with precision.

A seamless, orthographic texture-sheet of a sci-fi heavy repair vehicle hull, presented flat without any perspective, baked lighting, or overlaid text. The surface is primarily composed of rugged gunmetal rolled battle steel, featuring sections of deeply scorched plating and robust, riveted armor. Alien industrial detailing includes crimson and vibrant orange emissive strips that trace elaborate, asymmetric energy flow patterns across the panels, hinting at a hidden power grid. Interspersed are fluidic conduits that appear to transport glowing orange plasma beneath transparent segments, alongside panels that show repair work done with a biomimetic metallic compound, and strange, angular scorch marks revealing alien maintenance operations. The rivets are large, circular, and indented with glowing crimson sigils.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
